query: Deploy our TanStack Start app to Cloudflare Workers — install wrangler, generate wrangler.jsonc, add the cloudflare Vite plugin, and verify the build
Add Cloudflare Workers support to our existing Vite React project. We use bun as the package manager and the app is in apps/web/ in a monorepo
Run wrangler init on our project and set up the config for edge deployment. We need nodejs_compat flag and observability enabled
Our Cloudflare Workers build is failing with 'Node.js built-in module not found' — I think we're missing the compatibility flag in wrangler.jsonc
Migrate our Astro site from Vercel to Cloudflare Workers — install @astrojs/cloudflare adapter, create wrangler config, and add the deploy script
Set up a vanilla Cloudflare Worker with wrangler.toml and a basic src/index.ts that handles fetch requests — no framework, just a bare worker
The wrangler deploy command says 'not authenticated'. Walk me through the login flow and then configure wrangler.jsonc with our project name and today's compatibility_date
Our dist/server/ directory is empty after running vite build even though wrangler.jsonc exists. The cloudflare() plugin might not be first in the Vite plugins array
We have a Remix app with Vite and want to deploy to Cloudflare Workers. Set up @remix-run/cloudflare, create the wrangler config, and make sure the build produces the right output structure
I need to do my first production deploy to Cloudflare. Detect our framework from package.json, install the right deps, generate config, add deploy script, and run a build verification
Set up a Cloudflare KV namespace and bind it to our worker so we can cache API responses at the edge
Configure Cloudflare Pages with a custom domain and set up the _redirects file for our static site
Write a Cloudflare Worker that proxies requests to our origin server and adds custom headers for caching
Deploy our Next.js app to Vercel and configure the vercel.json with rewrites for our API routes
Set up a CI/CD pipeline in GitHub Actions that runs tests and deploys to our staging server on push to develop
Add Cloudflare R2 bucket storage to our existing Worker for uploading and serving user profile images
Configure our Cloudflare DNS to point to our AWS EC2 instance with an A record and enable proxying
Build a serverless function on AWS Lambda that processes webhooks from Stripe and stores events in DynamoDB
Our Docker container deployment to Fly.io keeps timing out on health checks. Help me fix the Dockerfile and fly.toml configuration
Set up Cloudflare Durable Objects for real-time collaboration features in our app — need to manage WebSocket connections with state
